snapshot_note: Bundled in the same single init-force release commit; a literal self-referential commit hash cannot be embedded without changing the commit hash. Use the published release commit plus these sha256 values as local integrity evidence only.
scope: complete contents copied from the AISP protocol schemas directory; README.md and this manifest are local snapshot metadata
trust_boundary: sha256 values provide local integrity evidence only; they do not prove upstream trust, safety, or provenance
